mapper.insert: INSERT INTO att_clock_record (user_id, clock_type, clock_time, ip_address) VALUES (#{userId}, #{clockType}, #{clockTime}, #{ipAddress})
mapper.select: SELECT DATE(clock_time) AS `date`, MIN(CASE WHEN clock_type = 'IN' THEN clock_time END) AS check_in_time, MAX(CASE WHEN clock_type = 'OUT' THEN clock_time END) AS check_out_time FROM att_clock_record WHERE YEAR(clock_time) = #{year} AND MONTH(clock_time) = #{month} GROUP BY DATE(clock_time) ORDER BY `date` ASC

SELECT u.real_name AS realName, COALESCE(d.dept_name, '-') AS deptName, 22 AS workDays, COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(cr.clock_time)) AS actualDays, SUM(CASE WHEN cr.clock_type = 'IN' AND TIME(cr.clock_time) > '09:00:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lateCount, SUM(CASE WHEN cr.clock_type = 'OUT' AND TIME(cr.clock_time) < '18:00:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS earlyCount, COALESCE(lr.leave_days, 0.0) AS leaveDays FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN att_clock_record cr ON cr.user_id = u.id AND YEAR(cr.clock_time) = #{year} AND MONTH(cr.clock_time) = #{month} LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, SUM(duration) AS leave_days FROM att_leave_request WHERE status = 'APPROVED' AND YEAR(start_time) = #{year} AND MONTH(start_time) = #{month} GROUP BY user_id ) lr ON lr.user_id = u.id WHERE u.status = 1 GROUP BY u.id, u.real_name, d.dept_name ORDER BY d.dept_name, u.real_name
